Dateline Resources Limited ( (AU:DTR) ) has issued an update.

Dateline Resources Limited has applied to the ASX for quotation of 5,670,000 additional ordinary fully paid shares, with an issue date of 8 April 2026, under its issuer code DTR. The new securities arise from the exercise or conversion of existing options or other convertible securities, modestly expanding the company’s quoted share capital and potentially impacting its capital structure and shareholder base.

The application, lodged as a new announcement on 14 April 2026, formalises the listing of these newly issued shares on the ASX. While no further operational details are provided, the move reflects ongoing capital management activity that may support future corporate initiatives and liquidity in the company’s stock.

More about Dateline Resources Limited

Dateline Resources Limited is an Australia-listed company trading under the ASX code DTR. The announcement relates to its ordinary fully paid shares, indicating that the business is financed through equity securities quoted on the Australian Securities Exchange, but the specific industry or operational focus is not disclosed in this filing.

Apollo Pipes Ltd. ( (IN:APOLLOPIPE) ) has issued an announcement.

Apollo Pipes Ltd. has commenced commercial production at its new manufacturing plant in Mirzapur, near Varanasi in Uttar Pradesh, effective April 14, 2026. The facility marks an expansion of the company’s production footprint in northern India, which is expected to support demand from regional construction and infrastructure activity and strengthen its competitive position in the domestic piping market.

More about Apollo Pipes Ltd.

Apollo Pipes Ltd. operates in the building materials sector, focusing on the manufacture of pipes and related PVC products for plumbing, water management, and infrastructure applications. The company serves construction and infrastructure markets across India, with a growing presence in northern regions such as Uttar Pradesh.

data.title: Imdex director Anthony Wooles trims indirect shareholding
data.description:
Claim 30% Off TipRanks

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions

Imdex Ltd ( (AU:IMD) ) just unveiled an announcement.

Imdex Limited has disclosed a change in the interests of director Anthony Wooles, following the lodgement of a formal notice with the ASX. The notice records an indirect disposal of 500,000 ordinary shares, executed via entities associated with Wooles, at an average price of $3.92 per share between 8 and 14 April.

After the transactions, Wooles’ indirect holding in Imdex has been reduced from 1,267,310 to 767,310 ordinary shares across two controlled entities. The update reflects routine governance and transparency obligations for director dealings, providing shareholders and the market with clear visibility over changes in substantial insider holdings.

The most recent analyst rating on (AU:IMD) stock is a Buy with a A$4.60 price target. To see the full list of analyst forecasts on Imdex Ltd stock, see the AU:IMD Stock Forecast page.

More about Imdex Ltd

Imdex Limited is an Australian company listed on the ASX that operates in the mining and resources technology sector. It provides drilling fluids, downhole instrumentation, and data solutions that support exploration and production activities for mining and energy companies globally, with a focus on enhancing drilling efficiency and geological data quality.

Average Trading Volume: 1,177,211

data.title: RUSAL Discloses Change in Voting Rights Held by SUAL Partners
data.description:
Claim 30% Off TipRanks

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Discover top-performing stock ideas and upgrade to a portfolio of market leaders with Smart Investor Picks

An update from United Co RUSAL ( (HK:0486) ) is now available.

United Company RUSAL has disclosed that SUAL Partners International LLC has terminated its direct right to dispose of a certain number of votes attached to RUSAL’s voting shares. The change stems from SUAL Partners’ acquisition of a participation share in the issuer, altering its status as a direct holder of voting rights and updating the company’s shareholder control profile for the Moscow Exchange and investors.

The notice, filed as an overseas regulatory announcement in Hong Kong and in Russia, formalizes the shift in voting rights structure without indicating any joint disposal arrangements or indirect control chains. While the operational impact is not detailed, the disclosure clarifies governance and ownership transparency, which is material for stakeholders tracking control dynamics and regulatory compliance across RUSAL’s multiple listings.

More about United Co RUSAL

United Company RUSAL is a leading international aluminium producer, incorporated in Jersey and continued in the Russian Federation as an international public joint-stock company. Its shares are listed in Hong Kong and on Russian exchanges, and it operates across the aluminium value chain from production to global sales.

Learn more about 0486 stock on TipRanks’ Stock Analysis page.

data.title: RUSAL Discloses End of SUAL Partners’ Direct Voting Rights in Company
data.description:
Claim 30% Off TipRanks

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Discover top-performing stock ideas and upgrade to a portfolio of market leaders with Smart Investor Picks

United Co RUSAL ( (HK:0486) ) has issued an announcement.

United Company RUSAL has disclosed that SUAL Partners International Limited Liability Company no longer has the right of direct, independent disposal over a certain number of votes attached to RUSAL’s voting shares. The notice, filed with the Moscow Exchange and mirrored on the company’s disclosure platforms, indicates that no significant indirect or joint voting rights remain that meet the 5% reporting threshold.

The change affects SUAL Partners’ governance influence over RUSAL but does not specify the exact size of the former stake, beyond confirming that post-termination holdings do not trigger additional disclosure chains. Investors may view this as a shift in the company’s shareholder structure and potential rebalancing of control among major stakeholders, although RUSAL has not announced any immediate operational or strategic consequences linked to this development.

More about United Co RUSAL

United Company RUSAL is an international public joint-stock company incorporated in Jersey and continued in the Russian Federation, with shares listed in Hong Kong and on Russian exchanges. The group operates in the aluminium industry, producing primary aluminium and related products for global industrial and manufacturing customers, and is a key player in Russia’s metals sector and international commodity markets.

data.title: Toho Launches Up to JPY 13 Billion Share Buyback via ToSTNeT-3 and Market Purchases
data.description:
Claim 30% Off TipRanks

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Discover top-performing stock ideas and upgrade to a portfolio of market leaders with Smart Investor Picks

Toho Co ( (JP:9602) ) just unveiled an announcement.

Toho Co., Ltd. has approved the acquisition of up to 7.5 million of its common shares, equivalent to 0.89% of its outstanding stock excluding treasury shares, through an off-auction own share repurchase using the Tokyo Stock Exchange’s ToSTNeT-3 system. The first consigned purchase order will be placed on April 15, 2026 at the prior day’s closing price of JPY 1,582, with execution limited to sell orders received at that time.

Under the broader buyback framework set by the board, Toho may spend up to JPY 13 billion to repurchase shares between April 15 and May 22, 2026 via both ToSTNeT-3 and regular auction-market purchases under a discretionary trading agreement. The program is expected to enhance capital efficiency and could support shareholder value by reducing the free float, though execution will depend on market conditions and the availability of matching sell orders.

The most recent analyst rating on (JP:9602) stock is a Hold with a Yen9300.00 price target. To see the full list of analyst forecasts on Toho Co stock, see the JP:9602 Stock Forecast page.

More about Toho Co

Toho Co., Ltd. is a Japanese entertainment company listed on the Prime Market of the Tokyo Stock Exchange and the Fukuoka Stock Exchange. The company is best known for its film production and distribution business, including major franchises, and operates across related media and content segments in the domestic market and abroad.

Average Trading Volume: 3,423,151

Technical Sentiment Signal: Strong Buy

Current Market Cap: Yen1420.4B

data.title: Oriole highlights bullish research as Mbe gold resource tops 1.2Moz
data.description:
Claim 30% Off TipRanks

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Discover top-performing stock ideas and upgrade to a portfolio of market leaders with Smart Investor Picks

Oriole Resources PLC ( (GB:ORR) ) has issued an update.

Oriole Resources PLC has highlighted a new research report by Greenwood Capital Partners on its operations, titled “Mbe project blasts through the 1Moz mark,” underscoring the rapid growth of resources at its flagship Mbe gold project in Cameroon. The company recently announced a combined JORC Inferred mineral resource estimate of 1.23 million ounces of gold at Mbe’s MB01-S and MB01-N deposits, supported by strong drill results and an ongoing fully funded step-out drilling programme aimed at further resource expansion.

The update also confirms that BCM has earned a 50% interest in both the Mbe and Bibemi projects after meeting exploration spending and financial commitments, with joint venture agreements now being drafted or discussed. Alongside progress at its Senala project in Senegal, where partner AGEM has completed a six-year earn-in for a majority interest, these developments signal growing third-party validation of Oriole’s portfolio and potential future cash flows from its diversified African and Turkish interests.

Spark’s Take on ORR Stock

According to Spark, TipRanks’ AI Analyst, ORR is a Neutral.

The score is primarily held back by weak operating fundamentals (no revenue) and ongoing cash burn, despite a strong low-debt balance sheet. Technical indicators are moderately supportive, while valuation is constrained by negative earnings and no dividend signal.

To see Spark’s full report on ORR stock, click here.

More about Oriole Resources PLC

Oriole Resources PLC is an AIM-quoted gold exploration company focused on projects in Central and West Africa, particularly Cameroon and Senegal. Its flagship assets include the Mbe project within the Central Licence Package in Cameroon, the Bibemi gold project where it holds 50%, and the Senala project in Senegal, alongside royalty interests in East Africa and Turkey.

Average Trading Volume: 29,076,958

Technical Sentiment Signal: Sell

data.title: Create Restaurants to Absorb SFP Holdings in Bid to Streamline Governance and Bolster Restaurant Group Strategy
data.description:
Claim 30% Off TipRanks

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Discover top-performing stock ideas and upgrade to a portfolio of market leaders with Smart Investor Picks

create restaurants holdings inc. ( (JP:3387) ) has provided an announcement.

Create Restaurants Holdings Inc., a multi-brand restaurant operator in Japan and overseas, has been pursuing a five-year medium-term plan to 2030 that emphasizes refining cuisine and service, M&A-driven growth and overseas expansion. Its consolidated subsidiary SFP Holdings Co., Ltd. operates well-known izakaya and dining brands such as Isomaru Suisan and Toriyoshi Shoten, with both companies having gradually integrated back-office and planning functions to raise efficiency.

The companies have agreed to an absorption-type merger making Create Restaurants the surviving entity and SFP Holdings the disappearing company, with the transaction scheduled to take effect on July 1, 2026. SFP Holdings’ shares are expected to be delisted from the Tokyo Stock Exchange on June 29, 2026, and the move is aimed at consolidating management resources, easing governance burdens associated with a listed subsidiary structure and enabling faster, unified strategic responses to structural challenges in Japan’s restaurant and izakaya sectors.

By eliminating the minority-shareholder constraints inherent in a dual-listed setup, Create Restaurants plans to optimize capital and human resource allocation across the group as it navigates labor shortages, cost pressures and changing consumer behavior, including weaker late-night and alcohol demand. The merger is positioned as a step to strengthen the group’s competitiveness and operational agility amid mounting regulatory and market pressures on listed subsidiary governance in Japan.

More about create restaurants holdings inc.

Create Restaurants Holdings Inc. operates a diversified restaurant business in Japan and overseas through 26 consolidated subsidiaries, pursuing a multi-brand, multi-location strategy under a medium-term plan running through fiscal 2030. Its subsidiary SFP Holdings Co., Ltd. focuses on specialized dining brands such as Isomaru Suisan and Toriyoshi Shoten, offering casual, relaxing food spaces and has been listed on the Tokyo Stock Exchange’s Prime Market since 2022.

The group has already integrated several shared functions, including accounting, HR, purchasing and store design, via joint ventures since 2020 to boost efficiency and streamline operations across the restaurant portfolio.

Average Trading Volume: 1,439,360

Technical Sentiment Signal: Strong Buy

Current Market Cap: Yen324.8B

Find detailed analytics on 3387 stock on TipRanks’ Stock Analysis page.

data.title: Gunosy Posts Higher Sales but Weaker Profits, Maintains Strong Balance Sheet and Dividend Plan
data.description:
Claim 30% Off TipRanks

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Discover top-performing stock ideas and upgrade to a portfolio of market leaders with Smart Investor Picks

Gunosy, Inc. ( (JP:6047) ) has provided an update.

Gunosy reported consolidated net sales of ¥4,986 million for the nine months ended February 28, 2026, a 7.7% year-on-year increase, while operating profit dropped 60.0% to ¥237 million and ordinary profit fell 10.6% to ¥350 million, leaving profit attributable to owners of parent flat at ¥204 million. Despite the profit squeeze, the balance sheet remained solid with an equity-to-asset ratio of 86.7%, and the company plans a full-year dividend of ¥22.00 per share, including a special ¥3.70 component, signaling continued shareholder returns.

For the full year ending May 31, 2026, Gunosy forecasts modest net sales growth of 5.8% to ¥6,450 million and a sharp 56.6% decline in operating profit to ¥250 million, even as ordinary profit is projected to rise 10.6% and profit attributable to owners of parent to jump 69.6% on a low base. The guidance suggests ongoing top-line recovery but pressure on core operating margins, with management prioritizing capital efficiency and shareholder payouts against a backdrop of higher treasury share holdings and stable equity levels.

More about Gunosy, Inc.

Gunosy Inc. is a Japan-based technology company listed on the Tokyo Stock Exchange that operates primarily in the digital media and internet services sector. The company focuses on providing news curation and related online services, monetizing its platforms mainly through digital advertising and affiliated content distribution in the domestic market.

Average Trading Volume: 225,293

Technical Sentiment Signal: Sell

Current Market Cap: Yen12.24B
